text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Mainichi Okan is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the race starts, Special Week
approaches Silence Suzuka with messages from
both El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fellow racers' impassioned messages energize
Silence Suzuka, and she steps onto the track with
her head held high.
